rules: Headings must use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) and be strictly Barlow Condensed.
Uppercase preferred for all structural elements (nav, tabs, cards).
Mono font exclusively for data blocks, code, file names, blockchain hashes, and stats.

surface_strategy.auth_left_split: bg-primary flex flex-col justify-between p-12 relative overflow-hidden
surface_strategy.auth_right_split: bg-white flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-8 md:p-24
surface_strategy.dashboard_sidebar: w-64 bg-primary text-white h-screen flex flex-col flex-shrink-0 border-r border-primary-mid
surface_strategy.dashboard_topbar: h-16 border-b border-border bg-white px-8 flex items-center justify-between
surface_strategy.cards: bg-white border border-border rounded-none shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

buttons.primary: bg-primary hover:bg-primary-mid text-white rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-medium uppercase tracking-wide
buttons.accent: bg-accent hover:bg-accent-light text-primary rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-bold uppercase tracking-wide
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-white rounded-none px-6 py-3 uppercase tracking-wide font-medium

inputs.text: border-border rounded-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-accent bg-white h-12
inputs.otp: w-14 h-16 text-2xl text-center border-2 border-border focus:border-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent rounded-none font-mono font-bold

badges.pro: bg-primary text-accent text-xs font-bold px-2 py-1 uppercase tracking-wider
badges.blockchain: bg-accent-pale text-primary border border-accent flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1 font-mono text-xs uppercase

components.role_pill_selector: flex gap-2 flex-wrap border-b border-border pb-4 w-full justify-center
components.file_upload_zone: border-2 border-dashed border-primary-mid/30 bg-background/50 p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center cursor-pointer hover:border-accent hover:bg-accent-pale transition-colors
components.kanban_card: bg-white border border-border p-4 shadow-sm border-l-4 border-l-primary cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing
components.real_time_indicators: flex items-center gap-3 font-mono text-sm text-text-muted

animations.page_transition: framer-motion: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
animations.staggered_list: framer-motion: variants={{ hidden: { opacity: 0, y: 20 }, visible: { opacity: 1, y: 0 } }}

media_urls.logo_concept: hexagon with '4X' in white + 'STRUCT' below in gold (use lucide-react Hexagon combined with Typography)
media_urls.hero_landing_description: Construction workers are on a building site with a crane.
media_urls.auth_split_description: High-resolution close-up of an architectural floor plan showcasing design details.
media_urls.abstract_bridge_description: Abstract view of a steel bridge structure against blue sky

icon_system: lucide-react (Industrial/Technical standard mapping: Hexagon for logo, HardHat for roles, LayoutDashboard for dashboard, GitMerge for Structural Clash Detector, CheckSquare for Spec Compliance, ShieldCheck for Safety, Fingerprint for Blockchain)
instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALLATION: Add required fonts via Google Fonts in index.html or layout: <link href='https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@400;600;700;800&family=IBM+Plex+Sans:wght@400;500;600&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap' rel='stylesheet'>
Ensure Tailwind config uses the specific hex values defined here.
Use framer-motion for smooth staggered appearances on the dashboard elements.
On the marketing page, use a heavy hero overlay with bg-primary/70 so the gold accent pops and text is visible.
All interactive elements (buttons, nav, cards) MUST have a unique data-testid attribute in kebab-case representing their role (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-btn').
Construct the 25 AI mode selector using an asymmetrical Bento grid (Grid Borders strategy) with 1px dark borders, ensuring the PRO badges are strictly Gold/Navy.
The 'Role pill selector' in the auth screen must be mapped exactly to: Detailer, Modular, Fabricator, Engineer, PM, Estimator.
Dashboard cards should have NO border radius (rounded-none) and 1px border. No soft shadows. Use sharp shadows or just border colors to signify states.
